title: Published Signal Snapshot Schema v0

fields.name: project_slug
fields.description: Public project slug used by 88CN public routes.

fields.name: canonical_url
fields.description: Reviewed official or canonical public URL.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Reviewed public category slug or label.

fields.name: technology_tags
fields.description: Reviewed public technology tags already safe for public display.

fields.name: public_source_links
fields.description: Reviewed public official site, docs, repository, launch, or pricing links.

fields.name: machine_readability_summary
fields.description: Public summary of machine readability or public metadata coverage.

fields.name: last_reviewed_at
fields.description: Time when the public metadata was last reviewed.

fields.name: public_changelog_summary
fields.description: Public changelog summary only when already approved for public display.

validation_rules: Every record must have published_status equal to published.
Every output field must be declared in fields.
Denied fields must not appear in NDJSON records or CSV headers.
Raw source rows must not be serialized directly.
Unknown facts must remain absent or null and must not be inferred.
Arrays in CSV must use deterministic pipe-delimited serialization after value-level escaping.
Snapshot generation must not write to the data repository in PR82.
Snapshot generation runtime is out of scope for PR82.
non_goals: No admin, payment, API key, metering, Signal Score internal, or Source Confidence internal fields.
